description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slender build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She has shoulder-length, wavy hair and a defined facial structure with visible eyebrows and a slight smile. The figure is dressed in a short-sleeved, fitted top and a knee-length skirt, both of which are simple in design and lack visible patterns or accessories. Her feet are bare, and her hands are relaxed with fingers slightly spread. The overall appearance is clean and cartoon-like, with smooth surfaces and minimal textural detail. The proportions and attire suggest a casual, everyday urban pedestrian.
description: A stylized adult female figure in a T-pose, wearing a short-sleeved top and knee-length skirt, with shoulder-length wavy hair and bare feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial features, fitted top, skirt, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the curve of the torso, and the side of the skirt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the back of the top and skirt, and both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the side of the torso, and the skirt from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved fitted top and knee-length skirt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
